SEARCH
Package model.entity

Klasse Entity

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Entity
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
Enemy, Player
public class Entity extends Object implements Serializable
Base class for all entities in the game.

An entity represents any living object with health, such as the player or enemies. It provides basic functionality for taking damage and healing.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Entity(String name, int health)
    Creates a new entity with the specified name and initial health.

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung

    getHealth()
    Returns the current health of this entity.
    int
    getMaxHealth()
    Returns the maximum health of this entity.

    Returns the name of this entity.

    Restores health to the entity by the specified amount.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Entity

      public Entity(String name, int health)
      Creates a new entity with the specified name and initial health.
      Parameter:
      name - the name of the entity
      health - the initial and maximum health value

  • Methodendetails

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this entity.
      Gibt zurück:
      the entity name

    • getMaxHealth

      public int getMaxHealth()
      Returns the maximum health of this entity.
      Gibt zurück:
      the maximum health value

    • setMaxHealth

      public void setMaxHealth(int maxHealth)
      Sets the maximum health of this entity.
      Parameter:
      maxHealth - the new maximum health value

    • getHealth

      public int getHealth()
      Returns the current health of this entity.
      Gibt zurück:
      the current health value

    • setHealth

      public void setHealth(int health)
      Sets the current health of this entity.
      Parameter:
      health - the new health value

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int amount)
      Reduces the entity's health by the specified amount.

      Health will not drop below 0.

      Parameter:
      amount - the damage amount to apply

    • heal

      public void heal(int amount)
      Restores health to the entity by the specified amount.

      Health will not exceed the maximum health value.

      Parameter:
      amount - the healing amount to apply
